input: WITH task_stats AS (SELECT o1.__id as task_id, o1.__label as task_name, COUNT(DISTINCT e1.target_id) as ref_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM objects o2 WHERE o2.__kind = 'Feature' AND o2.__file = o1.__file) as features_in_file FROM objects o1 LEFT JOIN edges e1 ON o1.__id = e1.source_id WHERE o1.__kind = 'Feature' GROUP BY o1.__id, o1.__label, o1.__file), workspace_summary AS (SELECT __workspace, COUNT(*) as total_objects, COUNT(DISTINCT __kind) as kind_count FROM objects GROUP BY __workspace), feature_details AS (SELECT f.__id, f.__label, f.__file, f.__namespace, ts.ref_count, ts.features_in_file, ws.total_objects as workspace_size FROM objects f INNER JOIN task_stats ts ON f.__id = ts.task_id LEFT JOIN workspace_summary ws ON f.__workspace = ws.__workspace WHERE f.__kind = 'Feature') SELECT fd.__id, fd.__label, fd.__file, fd.__namespace, fd.ref_count, fd.features_in_file, fd.workspace_size, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edges e2 WHERE e2.source_id = fd.__id) as outgoing_refs, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edges e3 WHERE e3.target_id = fd.__id) as incoming_refs, CASE WHEN fd.ref_count > 5 THEN 'high' WHEN fd.ref_count > 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END as ref_category FROM feature_details fd LEFT JOIN objects o3 ON o3.__id = fd.__id LEFT JOIN edges e4 ON e4.source_id = fd.__id WHERE fd.workspace_size > 10 AND (fd.ref_count > 0 OR fd.features_in_file > 1) ORDER BY fd.ref_count DESC, fd.__label ASC LIMIT 50
expected: WITH task_stats AS (SELECT o1.__id AS task_id, o1.__label AS task_name, COUNT(DISTINCT e1.target_id) AS ref_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM objects o2 WHERE o2.__kind = 'Feature' AND o2.__file = o1.__file AND o2.__workspace = 'ws1') AS features_in_file FROM objects o1 LEFT JOIN edges e1 ON o1.__id = e1.source_id AND e1.__workspace = 'ws1' WHERE o1.__kind = 'Feature' AND o1.__workspace = 'ws1' GROUP BY o1.__id, o1.__label, o1.__file), workspace_summary AS (SELECT __workspace, COUNT(*) AS total_objects, COUNT(DISTINCT __kind) AS kind_count FROM objects WHERE __workspace = 'ws1' GROUP BY __workspace), feature_details AS (SELECT f.__id, f.__label, f.__file, f.__namespace, ts.ref_count, ts.features_in_file, ws.total_objects AS workspace_size FROM objects f INNER JOIN task_stats ts ON f.__id = ts.task_id LEFT JOIN workspace_summary ws ON f.__workspace = ws.__workspace WHERE f.__kind = 'Feature' AND f.__workspace = 'ws1') SELECT fd.__id, fd.__label, fd.__file, fd.__namespace, fd.ref_count, fd.features_in_file, fd.workspace_size, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edges e2 WHERE e2.source_id = fd.__id AND e2.__workspace = 'ws1') AS outgoing_refs, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edges e3 WHERE e3.target_id = fd.__id AND e3.__workspace = 'ws1') AS incoming_refs, CASE WHEN fd.ref_count > 5 THEN 'high' WHEN fd.ref_count > 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS ref_category FROM feature_details fd LEFT JOIN objects o3 ON o3.__id = fd.__id AND o3.__workspace = 'ws1' LEFT JOIN edges e4 ON e4.source_id = fd.__id AND e4.__workspace = 'ws1' WHERE fd.workspace_size > 10 AND (fd.ref_count > 0 OR fd.features_in_file > 1) ORDER BY fd.ref_count DESC, fd.__label ASC LIMIT 50
